description_long: This ornate sconce features five lampshades arranged in a circular pattern, each supported by a delicately curved arm extending from a central column. The lampshades are pleated and semi-translucent, allowing light to diffuse softly. The structure is adorned with numerous faceted crystal pendants and droplets, which hang from both the arms and the base, adding a luxurious and sparkling effect. The central column and arms are crafted from clear or lightly frosted glass, with intricate scrollwork and decorative flourishes. The overall design is symmetrical and elegant, reminiscent of classic European chandeliers. The sconce is intended to be mounted on a ceiling, providing both illumination and decorative appeal.
description: A luxurious five-light sconce with pleated lampshades, ornate glass arms, and hanging crystal pendants, designed in a classic chandelier style.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five lampshades, symmetrical glass arms, and the full array of hanging crystal pendants.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the arms, the layered arrangement of the lampshades, and the side profile of the crystal decorations.
description_view_2: Direct rear view highlighting the central column, the back of the lampshades, and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and crystals.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1 but from the other side, showing the curvature of the arms and the distribution of crystal pendants.
attribute_fixture_design: Classic and ornate, this fixture features a vintage chandelier style with pleated fabric shades, glass scrollwork, and abundant crystal accents, evoking a sense of luxury and elegance.
